text:
Once upon a time there were an odd couple of animals. They were a bird named Boggleholsepeepyookyooze. Oh boy. They got up one morning and found themselves walking along the forest. Well, not really... More like they were hopping and gliding down a tree.

“Hooopy dooby doo!” exclaimed the owl.

“Yoo-hoo! Where are you going?” the owl asked the bird. (That owl had a voice like a owl.)

The owl was humming.

Well there was a little old spider monkey. They say he once saved an antelope from a predator.

So those were the main characters. There were others, but they weren't very interesting. What interests you about the owl?Something about the word.
